description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named trailscraper standard checks pipeline that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has four jobs: check-and-test which runs on multiple Python versions, release-readiness-setuptools and release-readiness-docker-build which depend on check-and-test, and codeql-analyse. Each job runs on ubuntu-24.04 and performs various tasks such as checking code style, running tests, testing setuptools and docker build, and performing CodeQL analysis.
